creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
Fix: Tested on i386: http://tinderbox.bayofrum.net/index.php?action=describe_port&id=133

	- Update to 6.1.4
		* Mostly a bugfix release
		* http://www.sympa.org/distribution/latest-stable/NEWS

	Submitter: Chris Rees <utisoft_at_gmail.com> (maintainer)




-- 
This message has been scanned for viruses and
dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.--EY7f2ji14uWIwZx1c7WG5xuluFqQnH3Yvev9y3hPnBRolmtH

 # Date created:				29 November 2003
 # Whom:					Autrijus Tang <autrijus@autrijus.org>

 PORTNAME=	sympa
-PORTVERSION=	6.1.3
+PORTVERSION=	6.1.4

 		http://www.sympa.org/distribution/old/
